title: oldenlandia grayi
intro: Oldenlandia grayi, also known as Gray's buttonbush or Gray's buttonweed, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its various health benefits. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in treating various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Oldenlandia grayi can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
